---
title: "670 Q1 Newest Code 0410"
author: "Ruisi Ma"
date: "2026-04-10"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

# =========================================================
# 1. File path
# =========================================================
file_path <- "C:/Users/lenovo/Desktop/Postcard Experiment IDs for Capstone.xlsx"

# =========================================================
# 2. Read four sheets
# =========================================================
full_sample <- read_excel(file_path, sheet = "Full Sample") %>%
  rename(id = `New ID Number`) %>%
  distinct(id)

pc1_nonresp <- read_excel(file_path, sheet = "Postcard 1 Nonresponders") %>%
  rename(id = `New ID Number`) %>%
  distinct(id)

pc2_nonresp <- read_excel(file_path, sheet = "Postcard 2 Nonresponders") %>%
  rename(id = `New ID Number`) %>%
  distinct(id)

respondents <- read_excel(file_path, sheet = "Survey Respondents with Date") %>%
  rename(
    id = `New ID Number`,
    Start.Date = `Start Date`,
    End.Date = `End Date`
  ) %>%
  distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE)

# =========================================================
# 3. Dates
# Use End Date as completion date
# Because only calendar date is available, define:
# responded before mailing = End.Date < mailing date
# =========================================================
t1 <- as.Date("2025-03-13")   # first postcard mailing
t2 <- as.Date("2025-04-10")   # second postcard mailing

respondents <- respondents %>%
  mutate(
    Start.Date = as.Date(Start.Date),
    End.Date   = as.Date(End.Date)
  )

# =========================================================
# 4. Build analysis file
# final card exposure:
#   0 cards = not in pc1 list
#   1 card  = in pc1 list, not in pc2 list
#   2 cards = in pc2 list
# =========================================================
dat <- full_sample %>%
  mutate(
    in_pc1 = id %in% pc1_nonresp$id,
    in_pc2 = id %in% pc2_nonresp$id
  ) %>%
  left_join(respondents, by = "id") %>%
  mutate(
    response_date = End.Date,
    responded_end = !is.na(response_date),

    responded_by_t1 = responded_end & response_date < t1,
    responded_by_t2 = responded_end & response_date < t2,

    card_group = case_when(
      !in_pc1              ~ "0_cards",
      in_pc1 & !in_pc2     ~ "1_card",
      in_pc2               ~ "2_cards"
    )
  )

# =========================================================
# 5. Basic counts: actual final postcard receipt
# =========================================================
table(dat$card_group)

card_count_table <- dat %>%
  count(card_group, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(percent = n / sum(n))

card_count_table

# =========================================================
# 6. Helper function
# feedback2-based policy estimators
# =========================================================
estimate_q1 <- function(df) {

  # RR_1: response by t1 in the full sample
  RR_1 <- mean(df$responded_by_t1)

  # Risk set after t1: those not responded by t1
  risk_t1 <- df %>% filter(!responded_by_t1)

  # Among risk set after t1:
  # randomized to no first postcard
  no_pc1 <- risk_t1 %>% filter(!in_pc1)

  # randomized to first postcard
  yes_pc1 <- risk_t1 %>% filter(in_pc1)

  # RR_2: response after t1 among those assigned no first postcard
  RR_2 <- mean(no_pc1$responded_end)

  # RR_3: response between t1 and t2 among those assigned first postcard
  RR_3 <- mean(yes_pc1$responded_by_t2)

  # Risk set after t2 within first-postcard arm:
  # those who got first postcard and still had not responded by t2
  risk_t2 <- yes_pc1 %>% filter(!responded_by_t2)

  # Among risk set after t2:
  # no second postcard = 1 card only
  one_card_only <- risk_t2 %>% filter(!in_pc2)

  # second postcard = 2 cards
  two_cards <- risk_t2 %>% filter(in_pc2)

  # RR_4: response after t2 among those not sent second postcard
  RR_4 <- mean(one_card_only$responded_end)

  # RR_5: response after t2 among those sent second postcard
  RR_5 <- mean(two_cards$responded_end)

  # Policy estimators
  RR_no_card  <- RR_1 + (1 - RR_1) * RR_2
  RR_one_card <- RR_1 + (1 - RR_1) * (RR_3 + (1 - RR_3) * RR_4)
  RR_two_card <- RR_1 + (1 - RR_1) * (RR_3 + (1 - RR_3) * RR_5)

  tibble(
    RR_1 = RR_1,
    RR_2 = RR_2,
    RR_3 = RR_3,
    RR_4 = RR_4,
    RR_5 = RR_5,
    RR_no_card = RR_no_card,
    RR_one_card = RR_one_card,
    RR_two_card = RR_two_card
  )
}

point_est <- estimate_q1(dat)
point_est

# =========================================================
# 7. Bootstrap for SE and 95% CI
# Resample within final card groups to preserve sample structure
# =========================================================
set.seed(12345)
B <- 2000

g0 <- dat %>% filter(card_group == "0_cards")
g1 <- dat %>% filter(card_group == "1_card")
g2 <- dat %>% filter(card_group == "2_cards")

boot_res <- replicate(B, {
  g0_boot <- g0[sample(seq_len(nrow(g0)), size = nrow(g0), replace = TRUE), ]
  g1_boot <- g1[sample(seq_len(nrow(g1)), size = nrow(g1), replace = TRUE), ]
  g2_boot <- g2[sample(seq_len(nrow(g2)), size = nrow(g2), replace = TRUE), ]

  boot_df <- bind_rows(g0_boot, g1_boot, g2_boot)

  est <- estimate_q1(boot_df)

  c(
    RR_no_card  = est$RR_no_card,
    RR_one_card = est$RR_one_card,
    RR_two_card = est$RR_two_card
  )
})

boot_res <- t(boot_res) %>% as.data.frame()

boot_res <- boot_res %>%
  mutate(
    diff_one_vs_no  = RR_one_card - RR_no_card,
    diff_two_vs_one = RR_two_card - RR_one_card,
    diff_two_vs_no  = RR_two_card - RR_no_card
  )

# =========================================================
# 8. Main summary table
# =========================================================
summary_table <- tibble(
  Setting = c("No postcard", "Up to 1 postcard", "Up to 2 postcards"),
  Estimate = c(
    point_est$RR_no_card,
    point_est$RR_one_card,
    point_est$RR_two_card
  ),
  Bootstrap_SE = c(
    sd(boot_res$RR_no_card),
    sd(boot_res$RR_one_card),
    sd(boot_res$RR_two_card)
  ),
  CI_Lower_95 = c(
    quantile(boot_res$RR_no_card, 0.025),
    quantile(boot_res$RR_one_card, 0.025),
    quantile(boot_res$RR_two_card, 0.025)
  ),
  CI_Upper_95 = c(
    quantile(boot_res$RR_no_card, 0.975),
    quantile(boot_res$RR_one_card, 0.975),
    quantile(boot_res$RR_two_card, 0.975)
  )
)

summary_table

summary_table_percent <- summary_table %>%
  mutate(
    Estimate = round(100 * Estimate, 2),
    Bootstrap_SE = round(100 * Bootstrap_SE, 2),
    CI_Lower_95 = round(100 * CI_Lower_95, 2),
    CI_Upper_95 = round(100 * CI_Upper_95, 2)
  )

summary_table_percent

# =========================================================
# 9. Difference table
# =========================================================
difference_table <- tibble(
  Comparison = c(
    "Up to 1 postcard - No postcard",
    "Up to 2 postcards - Up to 1 postcard",
    "Up to 2 postcards - No postcard"
  ),
  Difference = c(
    point_est$RR_one_card - point_est$RR_no_card,
    point_est$RR_two_card - point_est$RR_one_card,
    point_est$RR_two_card - point_est$RR_no_card
  ),
  Bootstrap_SE = c(
    sd(boot_res$diff_one_vs_no),
    sd(boot_res$diff_two_vs_one),
    sd(boot_res$diff_two_vs_no)
  ),
  CI_Lower_95 = c(
    quantile(boot_res$diff_one_vs_no, 0.025),
    quantile(boot_res$diff_two_vs_one, 0.025),
    quantile(boot_res$diff_two_vs_no, 0.025)
  ),
  CI_Upper_95 = c(
    quantile(boot_res$diff_one_vs_no, 0.975),
    quantile(boot_res$diff_two_vs_one, 0.975),
    quantile(boot_res$diff_two_vs_no, 0.975)
  )
)

difference_table

difference_table_percent <- difference_table %>%
  mutate(
    Difference = round(100 * Difference, 2),
    Bootstrap_SE = round(100 * Bootstrap_SE, 2),
    CI_Lower_95 = round(100 * CI_Lower_95, 2),
    CI_Upper_95 = round(100 * CI_Upper_95, 2)
  )

difference_table_percent
```
